title: UK FCA seeks feedback on guidance for crypto rules ahead of 2027 rollout
message_html: UK FCA seeks feedback on guidance for crypto rules ahead of 2027 rollout ...
snippet: The UK financial regulator has launched a consultation on crypto rules covering stablecoins, trading and staking ahead of a broader UK crypto regime expected to take effect in 2027.

title: Jeremy Allaire says Circle won't launch won-pegged stablecoin, but plans to monetise South Korean crypto boom
message_html: Jeremy Allaire says Circle won't launch won-pegged stablecoin, but plans to monetise South Korean crypto boom ...
snippet: Circle wades into South Korean lawmakers' and central bank's debate over won stablecoin issuance.
